name: Counter Craft 5
description: Counter Craft 5 features big arsenal of weapons and hordes of blocky zombies to shoot on famous dust 2 map, your mission is to strategically shoot tnt boxes to destroy hordes of incoming zombies and try to achieve given amout of killed zombies in order to progress and unlock new weapons.
instructions: WASD - Move LMB - Shoot RMB - Aim R - Reload G - Grenade Space - Jump
tags: 1 Player, 3D, 3D Games, First Person Shooter, Gun, Minecraft, Shoot, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooter, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL, Zombie
